case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. BIN LIANG et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, SHU T.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIANG, BIN LIN, YU-CHIEH CHEN, SHU T. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1000 CHESTNUT STREET, #06E, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94109, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
